expectations.text: Identifies REFACTOR_PLAN.md and UI_ANALYSIS.md as root violations and proposes docs/ destinations for each
expectations.evidence: Both flagged as misplaced; destinations docs/architecture|plans and docs/research suggested

expectations.text: Flags lowercase docs/archived/ for rename to ARCHIVED/
expectations.evidence: Notes case inconsistency but prescribes no standard: 'one convention...consistency matters more than the choice' — user left to decide
Naming inconsistency section lists setup-guide.md; fix checklist normalizes it

expectations.text: Flags docs/tasks_completed/ as task-related naming issue WITHOUT reorganizing its content (delegation boundary)
expectations.evidence: No delegation concept; proposed structure even invents a new divergent name 'TASKS_COMPLETED/' (with S), illustrating convention drift
Mentions missing cross-links and CHANGELOG, but never a docs index/README with writing rules

expectations.text: Made zero file modifications (audit is read-only)
Report is structured (tables/sections with summary), not free prose
expectations.evidence: Inventory table + numbered findings + ordered fix checklist; no summary count table but clearly structured
